morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Thursday, July 9, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. [NETFLIX] — Execution version signed; two watch items still need confirmation
   Research feed (7/10 dated artifact, already in hand) shows Effective Date now locked at July 10, 2026, resolving the long-open blank field. However, two risk items are NOT confirmed resolved in the execution text: the $150K liability cap (§13(d)-(e)) and NFL approval of the Loyalty Credit construct (§4(f)/(g)). MGs unchanged: $750K 2026 / $900K 2027, greater of MG or 70% Net Revenue. September 10, 2026 (Rams vs. 49ers, Melbourne) is the hard backstop, ~63 days out.
   Action: Confirm with Legal that §13(d)-(e) liability cap language is final. Push NFL Loyalty Credit approval to closed. Confirm EP internal sign-off on $900K Y2 MG with Finance/exec. Confirm §4(c-1) boxing replacement status ($250K max exposure, payable BY EverPass TO Netflix, due Oct 1, 2026). Deadline: EOD today.

2. [NBA] — Counter live with NBA; Finance sign-off status needs re-verification
   7/9 correction: prior 7/7 record that counter was "finalized internally" was inaccurate — the current EP counter (7.07 CLEAN) is live and already with the NBA. Brett Cicchillo replied 7/8: "I get the issue, let's [continue]" — momentum is live. Combined Y1 MG = $2.0M (NBA $1.5M / WNBA $500K). WNBA Y2 MG = greater of $250K or 150% of Y1 WNBA League Share paid (CFO revision 7/1, no cap). Combined CY1 EBITDA = −$830K; breakeven ~1,210 combined accounts.
   Action: Confirm Finance/RedBird sign-off status was obtained before the 7.07 CLEAN counter went out; reconcile cockpit vs. operator record. Raise WNBA commercial exclusivity ask with Cicchillo before/at Agreement stage.

3. [NESN] — Counter received; two execution gates remain
   Status is counter_received/ready-to-execute pending a la carte rate closure. MG held at $300K combined Yrs 1–2 / $350K Yr 3+ (performance threshold, no-cash exit position); all a la carte fire-code tiers still marked OPEN in Exhibit B. v23 counter sent 6/26; align call still sought.
   Action: Send response to Peter Plaehn confirming MG closure position, request a la carte rate bridging call, propose Exhibit C alignment call times.

4. [MEDIACOM] — Draft with Mark Finch for review; call scheduled
   7/9 status shift: proposal now circulating internally at Mediacom (Tapan → Mark Finch for review). Tapan wants a better referral rate vs. residential comps. Review call set for Tue 7/14, 11:00 AM ET. Economics still open.
   Action: Prep referral-rate comps ahead of the 7/14 call; confirm EP contracting entity (EverPass Media, LLC vs. EverPass Media II, LLC) with Legal; confirm Everage can track referral source tag with Darren.

## Active Deal Status

Partner              | Status                     | Next Action                                                          | Deadline
---------------------|----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|----------
Netflix              | Execution version signed   | Confirm liability cap + NFL Loyalty Credit approval; confirm Y2 MG    | EOD today (Sept 10 backstop)
NBA                  | Counter live w/ NBA        | Verify Finance sign-off status; raise WNBA exclusivity ask            | Open
NESN                 | Counter received           | Respond to Plaehn: confirm MG, request a la carte call                | Open
Mediacom             | Counter under internal review (Mediacom) | Prep referral-rate comps for review call                   | Tue 7/14 11:00 AM ET
ESPN/Disney          | In-negotiation — internal review | Finance sets MG floor (bracketed); confirm casino counter, then return to ESPN/Disney | Open
MLB                  | Counter received           | Send response to Max Johnson: MG figure, ad split %, Gap-Fill cap     | Open
NHL                  | Active negotiation         | Revert to NHL this week with a deal (v3 6/23 structure stands)        | Open
MSG/Gotham           | In-negotiation             | Per-unique-RSN counter direction agreed 5/29; awaiting formal send    | Open
Music Choice         | Terms Agreed - Pending Signature | Awaiting counter-signature from Brett Leitner                 | Open
Charter / Spectrum   | PASS/NO-GO                | No further action needed                                              | —
Monumental           | PASS/NO-GO                | No further action needed                                              | —
NBCU                 | PASS/NO-GO                | No further action needed                                              | —
AccuWeather          | PASS/NO-GO                | No further action needed                                              | —
Apmc / Victory+      | PASS/NO-GO                | No further action needed                                              | —
Comcast              | PASS/NO-GO                | No further action needed                                              | —

items.text: Signed: Provide AP contact; confirm launch date

EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…
New intro: Casino-driven intro; parties connecting on possible partnership
Signed: Executed 6/10. Ops transition; progress Chili’s co-sell + Xumo app; SMB FCO docs optional (Option #1)
Live: Clear LG QA defects (App ID 1290932 / Defect Issue); B2B hospitality parked to ~Oct whiteboard

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…
Counter · internal review: Revised proposal back on our paper; Finance sets the MG floor (bracketed) + confirm the casino counter, then back to Disney

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

bridge_signals.title: [internal] RE: Charter Remittance Template
bridge_signals.summary: They supposedly have 150+ sellers in the enterprise space so I do expect there will be volume. They're going to take down nearly 500 chilis locations as an example.

bridge_signals.title: [internal] Re: Charter Remittance Template
bridge_signals.summary: That is correct @Darren Miranda. If we see enough volume that justifies automating to Salesforce once we launch, we should discuss priority.

bridge_signals.title: [NetSpeed (ISP)] RE: ISP intro <> Nick
bridge_signals.summary: Thanks for the introduction Jason. Nick/Ryan, It would be great to connect if your schedule permits next week.

bridge_signals.title: [newsletter] Closing Bell: Bears proceeding with Indiana stadium plans
bridge_signals.summary: Disney sells out NBA Finals ad inventory. Bears moving ahead with plans for Indiana stadium.

bridge_signals.title: [internal] Re: Management Sync
bridge_signals.summary: Happy Friday! Please send me your topics for the management meeting on Tuesday, June 9th.

bridge_signals.title: [newsletter] Introducing the Audi Nuvolari: The future of plug-in hybrids is here
bridge_signals.summary: Plus: Target, Walmart to be part of Google's Universal Cart.

bridge_signals.title: [internal] RE: NBA LP Ops Readiness/Timeline discussion --- Salesforce / Evergent Buy-Flows and Schedule - YR1 Plan

bridge_signals.summary: Thank you - apologies for all the moving.
